# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

# ServiceEntry configuration for external services
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-services
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.externalservice1.com"
    - "*.externalservice2.com"
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS

# VirtualService configuration for routing traffic to external services
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-services
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.externalservice1.com"
    - "*.externalservice2.com"
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: "/api/"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: externalservice1.com
            port:
              number: 80
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: "/db/"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: externalservice2.com
            port:
              number: 443
